noticia.titulo: A Feline Haunting: The Quiet Horror of The Cat
noticia.texto_resumido: The Cat (2011) is a Korean horror film. Horror-comedy, supposedly, but it’s not the laugh-track kind of comedy. More the classical type. When I first checked it out while looking for genre films about cats (and discovering that Zombie Cats From Mars cannot be bothered with subtitles or closed captions, so forget that), one review […] The post A Feline Haunting: The Quiet Horror of The Cat appeared first on Reactor .
